title: HEM Strawberry Vanilla Incense Sticks – 6 Packs (120 Sticks) with JRose Wooden Burner | Sweet Fruity Aroma | Natural Hand-Rolled Indian Incense for Home, Meditation & Relaxation
features: ✅ 120 Sticks of Premium Incense – Includes 6 packs of HEM Strawberry Vanilla incense sticks (approx. 20 sticks per pack) for long-lasting fragrance and everyday use.
🍓 Sweet Strawberry Vanilla Scent – A delightful blend of fruity strawberry and warm vanilla to create a soothing, uplifting and joyful ambiance in your home or workspace.
🪵 Bonus JRose Wooden Burner – Comes with a handcrafted wooden incense holder to catch ash safely and stylishly while burning your favourite incense.
🌿 Natural & Hand-Rolled in India – Made from natural herbs, oils and resins by traditional Indian artisans for an authentic aromatherapy experience.
🧘 Perfect for Relaxation & Gifting – Ideal for meditation, yoga, spiritual rituals, or as a thoughtful gift for incense lovers and aromatherapy enthusiasts.
description: Transform your space into a sanctuary of calm with the HEM Strawberry Vanilla Incense Stick Set. This value bundle includes 6 individual packs (120 sticks total) of premium hand-rolled incense, crafted in India by the renowned HEM Corporation. Enjoy the sweet and creamy fusion of strawberry and vanilla, a fragrance that uplifts the mood, refreshes the room, and promotes relaxation. Each stick burns for approximately 30–40 minutes, making them perfect for meditation, spiritual rituals, yoga, or everyday home fragrance. Included in this set is a JRose Wooden Incense Holder, designed to hold sticks securely and catch ash neatly – combining functionality with a natural aesthetic. Whether you're enhancing your own space or gifting someone special, this incense set delivers a luxurious aromatic experience with both beauty and utility. HEM is a trusted name in incense, delivering premium fragrances for decades. Perfect for yoga, spiritual practices, or simply refreshing your living space.
